message:
test(fr-conformance): wire live oracle diff for strings + hash (br-frankenredis-o4su, br-frankenredis-6y8p)

Adds live_redis_core_strings_matches_runtime (307 cases) and
live_redis_core_hash_matches_runtime (137 cases) mirroring the existing
live_redis_core_errors pattern. Both run under run_live_diff_tolerant by
default and assert parity under FR_CONFORMANCE_LIVE_ORACLE_STRICT=1.

First-run parity:
  - core_errors:  144/144 pass
  - core_strings: 286/307 pass, 21 divergences
  - core_hash:    130/137 pass, 7 divergences

Divergences filed as [HIGH] review beads:
  - 7rp6: TTL accounting for absolute-time expiry (SET EXAT/GETEX PXAT/PERSIST chain)
  - t3xa: SETEX/PSETEX zero/negative error wording
  - 68ql: LCS/SUBSTR/SETRANGE error wording drift
  - a118: HINCRBYFLOAT Infinity error wording + HRANDFIELD arity wording
  - zk9q: HGETALL field iteration order (fixture vs our hash backend)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
